title: Full neighbours
statement: Are there any \(2\)-full \(n\) such that \(n+1\) is \(3\)-full? That is, if \(p\mid n\) then \(p^2\mid n\) and if \(p\mid n+1\) then \(p^3\mid n+1\).

title: Normalized prime gaps
display_title: The Distribution of Normalized Prime Gaps
statement: For every \(c\geq 0\) the density \(f(c)\) of integers for which \(\frac{p_{n+1}-p_n}{\log n}< c\) exists and is a continuous function of \(c\).

title: Erdős–Straus conjecture
statement: For every \(n>2\) there exist distinct integers \(1\leq x<y<z\) such that \(\frac{4}{n}=\frac{1}{x}+\frac{1}{y}+\frac{1}{z}\).

title: Monochromatic progressions in 2-colourings
statement: Let \(\delta_k\) be such that in any \(2\)-colouring of \(\{1,\ldots,n\}\) there exist at least \((\delta_k+o(1))n^2\) many monochromatic \(k\)-term arithmetic progressions. Give reasonable bounds (or even an asymptotic formula) for \(\delta_k\).
